# terrible_netapp_storagegrid_na_sg_grid_tenant (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `account_id` (String) Account Id of the tenant. May be used for modify or delete operation.
- `allow_compliance_mode` (Boolean) Whether a tenant can use compliance mode for object lock and retention. Requires storageGRID 11.9 or later.
- `allow_platform_services` (Boolean) Allows tenant to use platform services features such as CloudMirror.
- `allow_select_object_content` (Boolean) Allows tenant to use the S3 SelectObjectContent API to filter and retrieve object data.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Additional identifying information for the tenant account.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `management` (Boolean) Whether the tenant can login to the StorageGRID tenant portal.
- `max_retention_days` (Number) The maximum retention period in days allowed for new objects in compliance or governance mode. Requires storageGRID 11.9 or later.
- `name` (String) Name of the tenant. Required for create or modify operation.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `protocol` (String) Object Storage protocol used by the tenancy. Required for create operation.
- `quota_size` (Number) Quota to apply to the tenant specified in *quota_size_unit*. If you intend to have no limits, assign `0`.
- `quota_size_unit` (String) The unit used to interpret the size parameter.
- `root_access_group` (String) Existing federated group to have initial Root Access permissions for the tenant. Must begin with `federated-group/`
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Whether the specified account should exist or not. Required for all operations.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tenant_password` (String) Root password for tenant account. Requires root privilege.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `update_password` (String) Choose when to update the tenant password. When set to `always`, the tenant password will always be updated. When set to `on_create` the tenant password will only be set upon a new user creation.
- `use_own_identity_source` (Boolean) Whether the tenant account should configure its own identity source.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `resp` (String) Returns information about the StorageGRID tenant account.
